registration_correction.note: Clerical transcription repair only. The already frozen model, selected 2024 events, routing, risk, stops, targets and all evidence hashes are unchanged.

venue: Binance USD-M perpetual futures with Binance spot basis state

C_basis.signal: abs(prior-only 1440-minute USD-M contract/spot basis z) >= 3 during 12-15 UTC inclusive
C_basis.side: opposite sign of the prior-only basis z-score
C_basis.entry: next actual available strategy entry after the completed decision interval

price_flow_catchup_survival.model: frozen 2022-2023 development representatives plus 2024 monthly-purged survival LogisticRegression
price_flow_catchup_survival.admission_note: This component failed its original standalone positive-month gate. It is admitted only as a separately frozen complementary component because the already-observed 2024 one-slot ensemble improved growth, frequency and winner concentration. No standalone promotion claim is made.

routing.conservative_reconstruction: C_basis stop/target/horizon exits are replayed from minute OHLC with stop-first ambiguity; catch-up uses its frozen actual exit ledger.

selection_2024_evidence.not_claimed: The 2024 ensemble result is a selection result, not an unbiased future-performance estimate.

data_requirements: Checksum-verified official Binance USD-M execution data
Official Binance spot data or an independently hash-pinned spot series cross-checked against official archives before promotion
The exact frozen catch-up source revision and manifest
Identical global slot and component priority
confirmation_2025_contract.target_gate: Base-cost net geometric mean daily return >= 0.01.
confirmation_2025_contract.result_if_failed: Reject the ensemble without refitting on 2025.
confirmation_2025_contract.result_if_passed: Proceed to exact candidate-day trade/BBO replay, external-venue shadow replay and a later untouched holdout before Paper/Live authority.

prohibitions: No 2025-driven threshold, priority, risk, stop, target, cost or model changes.
No access to 2026 outcomes in this confirmation.
No Paper, testnet or live orders.
No complete deployment bundle unless the >=1% daily target and every pre-live audit pass.
